nav.linkAccountFirst: Link a Lichess or Chess.com username in Settings first

landing.heroTitle: Turn your games into a coach.
landing.heroBody: ChessInt is chess intelligence for your own games. Connect Lichess or Chess.com, and get full engine analysis, the weaknesses you repeat, and a personal AI coach — free, right in your browser.
landing.feature1Body: Stockfish runs in your browser and evaluates every move of every game — no server queue, no waiting.
landing.feature2Body: Not one-off blunders — the mistakes you repeat, broken down by phase, tactical motif, and opening.
landing.feature3Body: See which of your lines actually win and which quietly lose, with real win-rates from your own games.
landing.feature4Body: A written report that reads like a coach who studied hundreds of your games, with drills to fix each gap.
landing.stepsTitle: From 500 games to one clear plan
landing.step1Body: Link your Lichess or Chess.com username.
landing.step2Body: ChessInt reviews your full game history with the engine.
landing.step3Body: Get your weaknesses, an AI coaching report, and targeted puzzles.
landing.faq1A: ChessInt (short for Chess Intelligence) is a free web app that analyzes your own Chess.com and Lichess games. It runs engine analysis on your whole history, gives every move a game review, finds the weaknesses you repeat, and writes you a personal AI coaching report.
landing.faq2A: Yes. Engine analysis, the move-by-move game review, weakness detection, and puzzles are free with no game limit. The engine runs in your browser, so there is no analysis queue.
landing.faq3Q: Does ChessInt work with both Chess.com and Lichess?
landing.faq3A: Yes. Connect a Chess.com username, a Lichess username, or both, and ChessInt imports and analyzes your games from either platform.
landing.faq4Q: How is ChessInt different from the Chess.com game review?
landing.faq4A: ChessInt's game review is free and unlimited, needs no membership, works with Lichess too, and looks across your entire history to find the mistakes you repeat — not just one game at a time.
landing.faq5Q: Is ChessInt the same as Chessnut?
landing.faq5A: No. ChessInt is a free web app for analyzing your online chess games on Chess.com and Lichess. Chessnut is an unrelated brand of physical electronic chessboards.
landing.closingTitle: Find out what's really costing you rating.
